hero.h1Tagline: Know Your Shop. Control Your Profit.
hero.desc: Naphaa helps Nepali shop owners see their real daily earnings, track stock clearly, and run their business with confidence from one simple app.
hero.trustLine: ✓ Free forever  ✓ Works offline  ✓ Nepali & English
hero.focusText: See what you earned today without digging through reports.
hero.simpleText: Use it from your phone without training or complicated setup.
hero.offlineText: Keep your shop moving even when the internet is slow.

whoItsFor.label: Who This Is For
whoItsFor.heading: Made for Real Shops in Nepal
whoItsFor.desc: If you run a grocery store, clothing shop, pharmacy, or small retail business and want to understand your profit without complicated systems, Naphaa is for you.
items: You want simple daily profit visibility
You want to stop stock confusion
You want less stress at closing time

difference.label: Why Naphaa Feels Different
difference.heading: Not Another Complicated System
difference.subtext: Naphaa is built around the way real shops work every day, not around software jargon.

profit.title: Built Around Profit, Not Accounting
profit.desc: You see what matters most first: what you earned today.

phoneFirst.title: Designed for Phone-First Shops
phoneFirst.desc: No desktop setup. No special training. Just open the app and use it.

simple.title: Simple by Default
simple.desc: No crowded dashboard. Only the things you need to run the shop with confidence.

offline.title: Works Even When Internet Doesn't
offline.desc: Your shop should not stop because the network is weak.

outcomes.label: What You Can Do
outcomes.heading: Practical Control, Every Day
outcomes.subtext: Naphaa should feel useful in the first few minutes, not after weeks of setup.

demo.label: 60-Second Demo
demo.heading: See the story you will tell in one short video.
demo.desc: This space is ready for your demo. The goal is simple: show a shop owner how quickly Naphaa feels useful and how calm the daily routine becomes.
points: Open with a real shop problem, not a software intro
Show one fast sale, one stock check, and one daily profit view
End with confidence, simplicity, and a clear next step
demo.placeholderDesc: Drop your 60-second walkthrough here later. The layout is already in place.

trust.label: Trust
trust.heading: Your Data. Your Shop. Your Control.
trust.subtext: Trust comes from simple promises that matter when you are running a shop every day.
trust.footnote: Naphaa is designed to reduce stress, not add another system to manage.

howItWorks.label: How it Works
howItWorks.heading: Get Started in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtext: No jargon. No special setup. Just install, add a few products, and start using it.

one.title: Download Naphaa
one.desc: Install the app and open it.
one.detail: Start free and get moving in minutes.

two.title: Add your products
two.desc: Start with a few items. You can add more anytime.
two.detail: No need to set up everything before you begin.

three.title: Start recording sales
three.desc: See results immediately as you use it.
three.detail: Know what is happening in your shop right away.

items.text: Naphaa is easier to start because it focuses on the few things shop owners need every day.
Unlike notebooks, your data is safe, searchable, and never lost.
Unlike other apps, Naphaa works even when internet is out.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Start Free. Upgrade When You Grow.
pricing.subtext: Keep pricing simple and friendly. Start with the basics, then move up when the shop needs more.

free.title: Basic shop management
free.desc: A calm starting point for daily shop control.
free.microcopy: Start free and keep your daily routine simple.
features: Use it in Nepali or English

pro.title: Advanced insights and customer rewards
pro.desc: For growing shops that want deeper visibility and stronger customer relationships.
features: More control as your shop grows

faq.label: Questions
faq.heading: Real Questions From Shop Owners
faq.subtext: The goal is to remove hesitation, not add more confusion.

items.a: Yes. Your shop data stays protected, and backup options are built to make phone changes less risky.
You should be able to move to a new phone without losing confidence in your records.
Yes. Naphaa is designed so your shop can keep running even when your connection is weak.
No. Naphaa is meant to feel simple in the first few minutes, even if you are not technical.
Yes. You are not locked into a complicated commitment.

featuresPage.label: Why Naphaa
featuresPage.heading: A calmer way to run your shop every day.
featuresPage.desc: This page is not a feature dump. It is the practical reason Naphaa feels easier to trust: clearer profit visibility, simpler daily control, and less stress for the person running the shop.

pricingPage.label: Pricing
pricingPage.heading: Simple pricing for shops that want clarity, not complexity.
pricingPage.desc: Start free, build confidence in your daily routine, and upgrade only when your shop genuinely needs more insight.

howItWorksPage.label: How It Works
howItWorksPage.heading: A simple start matters more than a complicated setup.
howItWorksPage.desc: Naphaa should make sense fast. Install it, add a few products, and start seeing what is happening in your shop without a long onboarding process.

cta.badge: Built for shop owner peace of mind
cta.heading: Run Your Shop With Confidence.
cta.desc: Start free, stay clear on profit, and keep your shop under control every day.

footer.tagline: Clear daily control for your shop. Simple. Offline. Trusted.
